title: Smoky Roasted Middle-Eastern Lamb Roast
description: A flavorful and aromatic lamb roast with a smoky twist, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Rinse the lamb roast and pat it dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together the smoked paprika, cumin, coriander, salt, and pepper.
Rub the spice mixture all over the lamb roast, making sure to coat it evenly.
Heat the canola oil in a large oven-safe pan over medium-high heat.
Sear the lamb roast for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until it's browned.
Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and roast the lamb for 20-25 minutes per kilogram, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
Remove the lamb from the oven and let it rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing it thinly against the grain.
Stir together the lemon juice, garlic, parsley, oregano, and sumac (if using) in a small bowl.
Serve the sliced lamb roast with the lemon juice mixture spooned over the top.
